notes: Use these as candidate/enrichment sources, not as direct playable dumps.
Bundled app data should keep source attribution and license notes beside every generated deck.
ShareAlike sources are useful for research, but keep them separate unless the project intentionally accepts ShareAlike obligations.

sources.name: SCOWL / English Speller Database
sources.license: SCOWLv2 permissive terms with attribution/copyright notice
sources.risk: Low. Some larger dictionaries include uncommon or misspelled entries, so keep size thresholds conservative.

sources.name: Open Language Profiles English datasets from CEFR-J
sources.license: Research/commercial use with citation for CEFR-J A1-B2; C1/C2 Octanove data is CC-BY-SA 4.0
sources.risk: Low for A1-B2 with citation. Keep C1/C2 data source-separated because of ShareAlike terms.

sources.name: Open English WordNet
sources.risk: Low with attribution. Avoid unreviewed proper-name expansion unless a mode needs it.

sources.name: Princeton WordNet
sources.risk: Low with required notices. Older resource than Open English WordNet.

sources.name: CMU Pronouncing Dictionary
sources.license: Open-source machine-readable pronunciation dictionary; current releases use BSD-style terms
sources.risk: Low. Useful for filtering, not for semantic quality.

sources.name: wordfreq
sources.license: Apache-2.0 code; bundled data includes CC-BY-SA and attribution requirements
sources.recommendedUse: Frequency scoring during generation, not direct CSV extraction
sources.risk: Medium. Respect attribution and avoid flattening its data into attribution-free CSV.

sources.name: Word prevalence norms for 62K English lemmas
sources.recommendedUse: Research-only commonness validation unless the project intentionally accepts NonCommercial and ShareAlike restrictions
sources.risk: High for bundled runtime data because the published OSF materials are NonCommercial ShareAlike.

sources.name: Datamuse API
sources.license: Public read-only API with requested acknowledgment for public apps
sources.recommendedUse: Brainstorm related words and phrase candidates for review
sources.risk: Medium. Treat as candidate generation, then review/source generated entries separately.

sources.name: ConceptNet
sources.recommendedUse: Research-only semantic association graph unless ShareAlike is acceptable
sources.risk: High for bundling because ShareAlike terms need project-level handling.

sources.name: Wiktionary Dumps
sources.license: GFDL and CC-BY-SA 4.0 for text; Wikidata structured data is CC0
sources.recommendedUse: Research-only lexical reference unless ShareAlike/GFDL obligations are intentionally accepted
sources.risk: High for bundled word-bank data because of ShareAlike/GFDL obligations.
